name: Farsight Drive Blueprint Package
desc: A restricted Farsight Drive blueprint archive containing ship base-body construction methods, weapon patterns, and the auxiliary equipment needed to reproduce them. Priceless, unsettling, and very unlikely to have been released by accident.

name: Farsight Relief Charter
desc: A sealed humanitarian charter written in clean legal prose and stranger routing notation. Using it teaches the specifications needed to establish a Farsight Relief Charter and its Reflecting-Light Liaison Spire upgrade. The crystal-signed annexes imply the liaison network will answer to more than the local port authority.
